name: Teriyaki
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds boneless sirloin steak, 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1 Freeze meat for 1 hour to firm (makes slicing easier); slice into very thin strips.
2 Combine remaining ingredients except rice; pour over steak.
3 Marinate for 2 hours.
4 Thread meat on 4 skewers.
5 Broil about 4 inches from heat until desired doneness (5-10 minutes), brushing with marinade and turning once.
6 Heat remaining marinade; thicken if desired.
7 Serve with meat and rice. Makes 4 servings.
